name: react-hook-form
summary: Performant, flexible and extensible forms library for React Hooks

story.mental_model:
- Built with performance, UX and DX in mind
- Embraces native HTML form validation
- Out of the box integration with UI libraries
- Small size and no dependencies
- Support Yup, Zod, AJV, Superstruct, Joi and others
story.when_to_use: Use react-hook-form when you need performant, flexible and extensible forms library for react hooks.

nodes.label: react-hook-form
nodes.summary: Top-level module. Import as `import react_hook_form` or `from react_hook_form import ...`
